# Core Banking — Regulatory Constraints

## Capital and Prudential

| Regulation              | Requirement                                              |
|-------------------------|----------------------------------------------------------|
| CRR (EU 575/2013)       | Accurate risk-weight classification per account exposure |
| IFRS 9                  | Staging model: Stage 1/2/3 for credit impairment        |
| Basel III — LCR         | High-quality liquid asset data from account balances     |
| Basel III — NSFR        | Stable funding ratios computed from deposit base         |

## AML and KYC

| Regulation             | Requirement                                               |
|------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------|
| 5AMLD (EU 2018/843)    | Enhanced KYC for high-risk; PEP screening mandatory      |
| 6AMLD (EU 2018/1673)   | Criminal predicate offences; reporting obligations        |
| FATF 40 Recommendations| Risk-based approach; ongoing monitoring                  |

## Consumer Protection

| Regulation             | Requirement                                               |
|------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------|
| Consumer Credit Directive | APR on overdrafts; cooling-off period                 |
| MCD (Mortgage)         | ESIS disclosure; stress tests in calculations            |
| Payment Accounts Directive | Basic bank account access; fee transparency          |

## Data and Reporting

| Regulation             | Requirement                                               |
|------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------|
| FINREP (EBA)           | Quarterly financial reporting; XBRL format                |
| COREP                  | Capital adequacy reporting using IRB or SA approach       |
| CRS / FATCA            | Annual tax residency reporting; withholding on FDAP income|
| DGSD                   | FOLTF dataset within 24h of resolution trigger            |
